name: MangaDex
description: Fetches manga chapters and pages from the official MangaDex API. Supports multi-language with pt-br priority and automatic title matching from AniList metadata.
author: Mythra Team

configSchema.label: Preferred languages (comma-separated)
configSchema.description: Language priority list for chapters. Example: pt-br,pt,en. First language with available chapters is used.

configSchema.label: Data saver mode
configSchema.description: Use compressed images (lower quality, smaller size).

configSchema.label: Search cache TTL (minutes)
configSchema.description: How long manga search results are cached. Default: 60.

configSchema.label: Chapter list cache TTL (minutes)
configSchema.description: How long chapter lists are cached. Default: 30.

configSchema.label: Pages cache TTL (minutes)
configSchema.description: How long page URL lists are cached. Default: 10.
